arts.ttl: 'We will see': Maresca makes SHOCK admission over Palmer Chelsea future
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has hinted that Cole Palmer could face an uncertain future at Chelsea if they fail to qualify for the Champions League this season. Despite Palmer renewing his contract in August until 2033, speculation has been rife over his future amid reports that the 22-year-old’s deal contains a release clause if Chelsea do not qualify for the Champions League.
